section.heading: Statement of policy
section.chapeau: It is the policy of the United States that, to the maximum extent practicable—

paragraph.content: the transfer of jurisdiction over the Recreation Area from the Tennessee Valley Authority to the Secretary should be effected in an efficient and cost-effective manner; and

paragraph.chapeau: due consideration should be given to minimizing—

subparagraph.content: disruption of the personal lives of the Tennessee Valley Authority and Forest Service employees; and
adverse impacts on permittees, contractees, and others owning or operating businesses affected by the transfer.
